entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Tanya saya satu soalan yang membantu saya bermula."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Jangan berikan jawapan akhir dahulu. Tanya saya apa yang saya fikir langkah pertama."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Jelaskan mengapa langkah ini berkesan."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Beri saya petunjuk, bukan jawapan akhir."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Beri saya masalah serupa selepas saya menyelesaikan yang ini."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Ini jawapan saya. Salah tanggapan apa yang ditunjukkannya?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Ini percubaan saya. Apakah petunjuk paling kecil yang boleh membantu?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Jadikan similar practice problem selepas ini one."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Minta saya menjelaskan semula idea itu sebelum anda meneruskan."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Uji saya tentang topik ini dan tunggu jawapan saya."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Salah tanggapan apa yang boleh membawa seseorang kepada jawapan salah saya?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: A mudah uji

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Kuat gelung belajar looks like ini:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI boleh bantu anda belajar faster. Ia boleh also bantu anda avoid pembelajaran entirely.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hint. Jangan tanya untuk akhir jawapan yet.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil hint.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk semak itu step.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Pada akhir sesi belajar, tanya diri anda tiga soalan:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Attempt pertama. Spend three minutes trying tanpa AI.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Elakkan perangkap menyalin

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Bina gelung

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: Boleh Saya lakukan new contoh?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: Boleh Saya jelaskan idea tanpa looking?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Different tugas pembelajaran memerlukan different flows. Use Pembimbing Kerja Rumah untuk hints, Jurulatih Langkah Matematik untuk problem solving, Tutor Sokratik untuk deep understanding, kad imbas untuk recall, dan kuiz untuk pressure-tested practice.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Lakukan Saya know apa untuk practice seterusnya?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Jelaskan anda move. Tell AI mengapa anda chose seterusnya step.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Fix salah tanggapan.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Untuk writing, itu means using Jurulatih Penulisan untuk perbaik thesis, structure, atau paragraph sambil keeping anda voice. Untuk code, ia means using Tutor Kod untuk jelaskan errors, tanya anda untuk predict output, dan bantu anda debug berbanding pasting complete solution. Untuk exams, ia means using Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan untuk putuskan apa untuk ulang kaji pertama dan cara uji yourself.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Prompt yang baik untuk belajar dengan jujur

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Here ialah slightly lebih kuat version anda boleh reuse:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Cara belajar dengan AI tanpa menipu diri sendiri

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Jika jawapan ialah yes, AI helped anda belajar. Jika jawapan ialah no, seterusnya move bukan more reading. Ia ialah active practice. Buka Belajar Apa Sahaja, Arahan Sokratik, atau Pembelajaran AI prompt perpustakaan dan tukar topik menjadi task anda mempunyai untuk attempt.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Jika work ialah kerja rumah, mula dalam Pembimbing Kerja Rumah. Jika ia ialah math, use Jurulatih Langkah Matematik dan tanya ia untuk semak one step pada time. Jika anda ialah trying untuk fahami konsep deeply, use Arahan Sokratik dan jawapan soalan sebelum asking untuk summary.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Jika anda menampal soalan kerja rumah dan menyalin jawapan akhir, tugas mungkin siap tetapi kemahiran belum terbina. Jika anda meminta petunjuk, menerangkan pemikiran anda, membandingkan jawapan, dan mencuba masalah serupa, AI menjadi rakan belajar, bukan jalan pintas.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Latihan a new version.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Practice transfer. Tanya untuk similar problem dengan different numbers, wording, atau context.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Tukar lemah spot menjadi card dalam Pembina Kad Imbas atau ringkas kuiz dalam Uji Saya Dengan Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Tanya apa jawapan anda reveals tentang anda understanding.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: belajar skills

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Belajar dengan AI works terbaik apabila alat keeps anda dalam driver's seat.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Itu ialah warning sign. Recognition bukan recall. Reading jelas explanation bukan same as sedang able untuk solve new problem, tulis paragraph, atau jawapan soalan di bawah pressure.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Itu loop ialah slower than menyalin, tetapi ia ialah much faster than staying confused.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Perangkap menyalin itu halus. Ia tidak selalu terasa seperti menipu. Kadangkala ia terasa seperti cekap. AI menerangkan sesuatu dengan cantik, anda mengangguk, kemudian bergerak edasi. Sepuluh minit kemudian anda tidak dapat menghasilkan semula idea itu tanpa jawapan di depan mata.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Difference ialah bagaimana anda use ia.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Soalannya bukan sama ada AI patut menjadi sebahagian daripada belajar. Bagi ramai pelajar, ia sudah pun begitu. Soalan yang lebih baik ialah sama ada alat itu membantu anda membina ingatan, pertimbangan, dan keyakinan, atau secara senyap membuang cabaran tepat yang membuat pembelajaran melekat.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Langkah pemindahan ialah kuncinya. Jika anda hanya boleh menyelesaikan masalah tepat yang baru diterangkan AI, anda telah mempelajari contoh. Jika anda boleh menyelesaikan masalah seumpamanya, anda mula mempelajari idea.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Ini bukan magic words. Mereka ialah guardrails. Mereka keep conversation berfokus di pemikiran bukannya jawapan collection.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Ini prompt keep anda active. Mereka jadikan AI sokong anda penaakulan berbanding replace ia.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Cuba prompt seperti ini:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Try problem yourself.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Use AI as coach untuk understanding, practice, dan feedback bukannya shortcut itu quietly removes pembelajaran.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Gunakan AI untuk pemikiran di sekitar jawapan

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Gunakan prompt yang membuat AI memperlahankan diri:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Gunakan mod yang betul

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Use ini rule: selepas any AI explanation, close loop dengan output daripada anda own mind. Tulis idea back. Solve fresh version. Jadikan kad imbas. Teach ia untuk imaginary younger pelajar. Tanya untuk kuiz. more session asks anda untuk produce, less likely anda ialah untuk fool yourself.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Tulis anda langkah seterusnya.
